name: hipaa_asset_controls_base_features_v1
description: HIPAA decision-grade asset control features derived from dev_assets to support technical safeguard evidence and continuous monitoring (silver layer).

properties.notes: Row-level derived features only; higher-level compliance KPIs should be computed in gold.

hipaa_access_control_safeguards.name: hipaa_access_control_safeguards
hipaa_access_control_safeguards.description: Asset signals supporting access control and secure configuration expectations for protected systems.

features.name: hipaa_domain_joined_flag
features.description: Derived boolean indicating whether the asset participates in centralized identity controls (domain joined).
features.purpose: Proxy for stronger access governance and account management expectations for regulated endpoints.

features.name: hipaa_secure_boot_enabled
features.purpose: Evidence-ready hardening signal for HIPAA technical safeguards related to system integrity.

features.name: hipaa_powershell_exec_policy_risk
features.purpose: High-risk execution policy increases likelihood of endpoint compromise impacting ePHI systems.

hipaa_transmission_and_network_exposure_.name: hipaa_transmission_and_network_exposure_proxies
hipaa_transmission_and_network_exposure_.description: Asset-level signals that proxy transmission security and exposure risks.

features.name: hipaa_smb_legacy_protocol_enabled
features.description: True when smb1 is enabled; legacy protocol exposure can increase unauthorized disclosure risk.
features.purpose: Used as a misconfiguration signal tied to HIPAA confidentiality risk.

features.name: hipaa_is_internet_exposed_proxy
features.description: Heuristic boolean derived from device_zone/roles/search_tags indicating likely internet exposure.
features.purpose: High-value signal for systems potentially exposed to external threats affecting ePHI environments.

hipaa_audit_controls_and_monitoring.name: hipaa_audit_controls_and_monitoring
hipaa_audit_controls_and_monitoring.description: Evidence freshness features supporting audit control expectations (continuous visibility & monitoring recency).

features.name: hipaa_asset_last_seen_ts
features.description: Most recent observation timestamp derived from events_timestamp/last_processed/store_updated_at.
features.purpose: Used to prove monitoring coverage and recency for audit readiness.

features.name: hipaa_minutes_since_last_seen
features.purpose: Detects telemetry gaps that weaken continuous audit evidence posture.

features.name: hipaa_is_active_asset
features.description: True when asset has been seen recently and is not retired.
features.purpose: Scoping feature for HIPAA systems requiring active monitoring and safeguards.

hipaa_device_and_workstation_safeguards.name: hipaa_device_and_workstation_safeguards
hipaa_device_and_workstation_safeguards.description: Signals supporting workstation and device safeguard posture (location + classification + lifecycle).

features.name: hipaa_device_type_normalized
features.description: Normalized device class derived from device_type/device_subtype (server/workstation/laptop/unknown).
features.purpose: Different safeguard expectations apply to servers vs endpoints in HIPAA environments.

features.name: hipaa_location_fingerprint
features.description: Normalized geo/site fingerprint for the asset.
features.purpose: Used for physical safeguard evidence and segmentation of regulated sites.

features.name: hipaa_asset_environment
features.purpose: Helps scope regulated production systems that may store/process ePHI.

hipaa_maintenance_and_integrity_proxies.name: hipaa_maintenance_and_integrity_proxies
hipaa_maintenance_and_integrity_proxies.description: Row-level signals tied to maintenance readiness and integrity safeguards (patch completion and drift).

features.name: hipaa_reboot_pending_flag
features.description: True when is_reboot_pending indicates pending reboot to complete patching or hardening changes.
features.purpose: Signals incomplete remediation state which increases likelihood of exposure.

features.name: hipaa_uptime_days
features.description: Uptime in days derived from uptime_mins / 1440.
features.purpose: Proxy for patch cadence and maintenance hygiene (extreme uptime can indicate deferred maintenance).

features.name: hipaa_os_install_age_days
features.purpose: Lifecycle maturity signal; older installs may correlate with drift and baseline non-compliance.
